Earn a pack containing 2 Rare Gold Player Items, rated 86 or higher.

### [2x 86+ Upgrade 14,300![Image 1: FC Coin](https://www.fut.gg/public-assets/coin.webp)](https://www.fut.gg/sbc/upgrades/26-784-2x-86-upgrade/)

[![Image 3: 2x 86+ Upgrade](https://game-assets.fut.gg/cdn-cgi/image/quality=85,format=auto,width=400/2026/sbcs/784.png) Earn a pack containing 2 Rare Gold Player Items, rated 86 or higher.](https://www.fut.gg/sbc/upgrades/26-784-2x-86-upgrade/)
Earn a pack containing 2 Rare Gold Player Items, rated 86 or higher.

*   Exactly 11 Players: Rare
